headline: What TKO Group Holdings (TKO)'s UFC Expansion into Azerbaijan Means For Shareholders
summary: UFC and Azerbaijan’s Ministry of Youth and Sports, together with Baku City Circuit Operations Company, previously agreed a multi-year deal to stage annual UFC Fight Night events in Baku through 2028, beginning with UFC Fight Night Baku on June 27 at the National Gymnastics Arena. This expansion into Azerbaijan underlines how governments are using TKO’s combat sports properties as anchor events to promote their countries as international sports destinations. Against that backdrop, we’ll...
